creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
On fedoras' mirrors alsa-lib was upgraded from 1.0.20 to 1.0.21, so this should be upgraded also in port, that alsa-lib can be downloaded.

Fix: 

diff for Makefile:
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.20
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.21

and of course `make makesum` should be called
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/port/audio/linux-f10-alsa-lib && make install
